summary: Daily analytics dashboards were delayed after the reporting pipeline retried a failed batch.

severity.rationale: Partial or intermittent impact with available workaround or limited blast radius.

evidence.text: Daily analytics dashboards were delayed after the reporting pipeline retried a failed batch.
Internal teams saw stale analytics dashboards for 79 minutes. No customer-facing systems were impacted.

contributing_factors.description: The reporting pipeline failed because a warehouse export dependency timed out.

evidence.text: The reporting pipeline failed because a warehouse export dependency timed out. The retry process completed successfully but delayed dashboard freshness.

action_items.description: Add an alert for reporting pipeline export duration.

evidence.text: Add an alert for reporting pipeline export duration.
Internal teams saw stale analytics dashboards for 79 minutes. No customer-facing systems were impacted.

action_items.description: Document the retry process for warehouse export delays.

evidence.text: Document the retry process for warehouse export delays.

supporting_evidence.text: Internal teams saw stale analytics dashboards for 79 minutes. No customer-facing systems were impacted.
The reporting pipeline failed because a warehouse export dependency timed out. The retry process completed successfully but delayed dashboard freshness.
The team allowed the retry to complete and verified dashboard data freshness after the export finished.
02:05 UTC - Batch job failed during warehouse export. | 02:18 UTC - Retry started automatically. | 03:06 UTC - Export completed. | 03:24 UTC - Dashboards refreshed with current data.
